description: Petition to the caliph al-Mustanṣir from a man seeking employment in the caliph’s service. Draft, opening only. Dating: ca. 427–87/1036–94. On the other pages is a portion of a masoretic treatise discussing qere-ketiv and mappiq in final he. (Information from CUDL and Khan.)
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית מהמאה ה-11. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
